name: picoedit-plugin
description: Beginner-friendly PicoEdit setup, asset catalog, and local build assistance for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Operate PicoEdit setup, assets, and builds.
interface.longDescription: Helps Codex prepare PicoEdit for beginners, read the Cloudflare R2 asset catalog, and guide local rough-cut workflows without exposing command-line details.
defaultPrompt: PicoEditの素材カタログを確認して
PicoEditの初期設定を確認して
PicoEditのラフカット生成を手伝って
